# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for CONCIERGE. TAB-separated (4 fields). See PREREQUISITES/.
# CONCIERGE degrades gracefully — its hooks and the status line fall back to pure-bash when a
# tool is absent, so nothing here is hard-required beyond bash itself.

install-hint: apt install jq (clean JSON for hooks + statusline; pure-bash fallback otherwise)
apt install git (statusline branch field; degrades to harness-provided fields)
preinstalled on most systems (token-scheduler arithmetic: estimates, ceiling math, off-peak windows)
npm i -g bats (optional convenience for the scheduler test suite; test/run.sh needs only bash+jq+awk)
